microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's recovery validation program from a 2-person operation into a **platformized analytics system**, standardizing workflows to sustain 45+ annual resilience drills and drive **$14M+ business impact** across enterprise customers including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led 0→1 development of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining product requirements and **self-service reporting capabilities** that reduced operational toil by 30% and transitioned execution to a scalable, insight-driven model for cross-functional stakeholders.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, delivering a rack-level drill program in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate**, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a reusable framework for continuous performance validation at scale.

Directed **14 cross-org recovery executions** under executive visibility, including serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract requiring rigorous data storytelling and stakeholder alignment.

Scaled team leverage through AI-driven automation, building an internal AI agent and restructuring planning workflows to **reduce cycle time by 39%** and increase drill capacity by 21%, improving the team's analytical throughput and prioritization quality.
microsoft_2023: Championed adoption of AI-driven code generation workflows, conducting user demos and training sessions that drove **utilization across 14 teams** and saved 37 engineering hours monthly by embedding analytics-backed insights into team decision-making.

Influenced the product roadmap to include intent-based YAML generation by facilitating **11+ structured user interviews** with Azure service teams to surface critical feature gaps and translate ambiguous needs into clear analytical and product requirements.

Improved data integrity and self-service analytics by implementing rigorous metadata standards and migrating documentation to an AI-powered semantic search tool, **cutting lookup time by 83%** and enabling faster, higher-quality insight generation across teams.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched regions 28% faster by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework, building the analytical foundation to drive measurable business impact across 140+ teams.

Mobilized a data-driven product strategy to reduce operational toil during region launches, conducting discovery with 20+ service teams to **quantify 81 hours of manual effort** per region and building a roadmap to automate high-impact critical paths.

Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to identify automation gaps, prioritize high-value investments, and apply consistent metric definitions and reporting standards across the org.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot transition by defining the legacy OS migration strategy, mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations, and building a clear analytical framework to track progress against conversion milestones.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies including sprint planning and retrospectives, **resolving 40+ high-priority tickets** by applying structured prioritization to the backlog and improving the developer intake process with scalable, reusable triage standards.

Drove strategic alignment across IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and improving operational efficiency through data-informed process improvements.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by optimizing operations and managing the end-to-end scoping and invoicing lifecycle for 200+ monthly proposals, leveraging a new CRM process to surface conversion patterns and improve scheduling efficiency.

Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and boosted conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing the website and Google profile using performance data to target high-value customer segments.

Improved leadership pricing models by conducting **financial profitability analysis** across 1,000+ project records to identify and seal margin leaks, translating complex commercial data into clear recommendations that informed pricing strategy.

Built a reusable reporting framework to track proposal win rates, margin by job type, and seasonal demand trends, enabling leadership to make **data-driven prioritization decisions** and allocate resources toward the highest-value market segments.
